title: ZXBrick Complete Guide
description: Everything you need to know about ZXBrick, from mastering the controls to completing all 100 handcrafted levels and climbing the leaderboards.
summary: Learn how to play ZXBrick, improve your skills, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and master every level.

sections.heading: What Is ZXBrick?
paragraphs: ZXBrick is a retro-inspired brick-breaking arcade game and part of the ZX Series from BarkinMad Studios.
Clear 100 handcrafted levels, collect power-ups, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for the highest scores as you improve your skills.

sections.heading: How to Play
paragraphs: Your objective is simple: destroy every brick, keep the ball in play, and complete each level.
Every new level introduces fresh layouts and new challenges, rewarding accurate paddle control, good reactions, and clever use of power-ups.

sections.heading: Master the Controls
paragraphs: Smooth paddle movement is the key to success. Small, controlled movements make it easier to react quickly and keep the ball under control.
As your confidence grows, you'll naturally improve your timing and accuracy.

sections.heading: Build Your Skills
paragraphs: A short warm-up game is a great way to settle into the controls before attempting longer sessions.
As you improve, challenge yourself to complete more levels, beat your highest score, or unlock your next achievement.

sections.heading: 100 Handcrafted Levels
paragraphs: ZXBrick features 100 handcrafted levels, each designed to test your reactions, precision, and consistency.
Every completed level brings you one step closer to mastering the game.

sections.heading: Power-Ups
paragraphs: Power-ups can help you survive difficult situations and improve your score.
Learning when to use them is just as important as collecting them, making good timing a key part of mastering ZXBrick.

sections.heading: Achievements
paragraphs: Game Center achievements reward regular play and important gameplay milestones.
Unlock achievements by completing games and destroying more bricks as your skills improve.

sections.heading: BarkinMad Coins
paragraphs: Earn BarkinMad Coins through regular gameplay and use them to unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.
Coins reward regular play without changing the fast-paced arcade experience.

sections.heading: Leaderboards
paragraphs: Compete for the highest score and compare your performance with players around the world using Apple Game Center.
Every game is another opportunity to climb the leaderboard.

sections.heading: Tips & Strategy
paragraphs: Focus on smooth paddle control before increasing your speed.
Take time to learn each level and don't be afraid to replay difficult stages until you're comfortable with them.
Consistent play is the fastest way to improve.

faq.question: Is ZXBrick part of the ZX Series?
faq.answer: Yes. ZXBrick is part of the ZX Series and shares BarkinMad Coins, achievements, and progression with other supported ZX Series games.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick include BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: Yes. Earn BarkinMad Coins through gameplay and unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.

faq.question: Does ZXBrick support leaderboards?
faq.answer: Yes. Compete for the highest score through Apple Game Center leaderboards.

featureShowcases.heading: Everything You Need to Master ZXBrick
featureShowcases.summary: From your first game to your highest score, this guide explains every part of ZXBrick.
body: Whether you're just getting started or aiming to complete all 100 levels, this guide brings together everything you need to know in one place.
Learn the controls, discover power-ups, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and improve your arcade skills.

image.caption: Everything you need to become a ZXBrick master.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Game Helps You Improve
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every game you play.
body: Every completed level helps you build your skills while unlocking achievements, earning BarkinMad Coins, and climbing the leaderboards.
The more you play, the more rewarding your progress becomes.

image.caption: Every game brings you closer to mastering ZXBrick.
